title: jacquemontia ovalifolia subsp. sandwicensis
intro: Jacquemontia ovalifolia subsp. sandwicensis, also known as Hawaiian morning glory, is a plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family and is native to Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jacquemontia ovalifolia subsp. sandwicensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which are made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or other solvents.
